basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the IIT Delhi office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech or equivalent in Mechanical Engineering. Desirable: Masters' degree in Mechanical Engineering.
qualification.details: Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.) B.Tech or equivalent in Mechanical Engineering. Masters' degree in Mechanical Engineering (Desirable). Experience: Preparing CAD drawings, design calculations for components and assemblies; Fabrication, Testing and Installation of prototypes.

salary_details.details: Consolidated Pay-slab / Fellowship: Rs. 47,790-62,350/-p.m plus HRA @27%

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment is Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in date for the interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in date for the interview is 26 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required is B.Tech or equivalent in Mechanical Engineering. A Masters' degree in Mechanical Engineering is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is a consolidated pay-slab/fellowship of Rs. 47,790-62,350/- p.m plus HRA @27%.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at IIT Delhi, New Delhi, 110016.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their formal application on Form No. IRD/REC-4, original certificates (academic & professional), and a recent passport size photograph.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the time of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The time of the walk-in interview is 04:00 PM.
